title: Pre-op diabetes documentation anesthesia
source_review_basis: committed exact-section summaries and evidence records; full guideline documents were not retained for this pass

medication.text: Supports clinician review of diabetes, comorbidities, relevant results, medication reconciliation, and a patient-involved individualized perioperative plan without generating medicine changes or doses.
medication.rationale: The preoperative section supports recording an individualized clinician-agreed plan and patient involvement but does not support medicine changes or doses.
medication.evidence_extract: Supports clinician review of diabetes, comorbidities, relevant results, medication reconciliation, and a patient-involved individualized perioperative plan without generating medicine changes or doses.

source.title: Guideline for Perioperative Care for People with Diabetes Mellitus Undergoing Elective and Emergency Surgery

exact_section.heading: Recommendations for surgical outpatients and preoperative assessment

referral.text: Supports documenting diabetes type, care provider, last review, HbA1c, current medicines and devices, BMI, blood pressure, kidney function, comorbidities, and diabetes complications at referral.
referral.rationale: The exact CPOC section supports documenting diabetes type, recent review, medicines and devices, HbA1c, BMI, blood pressure, renal function, comorbidity, and complication context.
referral.evidence_extract: Supports documenting diabetes type, care provider, last review, HbA1c, current medicines and devices, BMI, blood pressure, kidney function, comorbidities, and diabetes complications at referral.

source_limitations: Diabetes type and control, HbA1c, glucose pattern, hypoglycemia, medicines and devices, complications, renal function, fasting, procedure timing, medicine changes, monitoring, emergency pathway, and follow-up remain unsupported.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
All prior supported legacy-item mappings were removed because canonical item-level applicability and workflow-specific rationale were not present in explicit repository records.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
